heading: Step 4:  Include driver syntax.
body:
Click the **Include Driver Syntax** checkbox to include
application code for the selected programming language. If you include
driver syntax, the copyable code reflects [project](atlas-ui-query-bar-project), [sort by a field](atlas-ui-query-bar-sort),
[maxTimeMS](atlas-ui-query-bar-max-time-ms), [collation](atlas-ui-query-bar-collation), [skip](atlas-ui-query-bar-skip), and
[limit](atlas-ui-query-bar-limit) options.
